name: 硬核反擊型
description: 女主面對挑釁時以氣勢和智慧回擊，台詞精煉有力，讓觀眾獲得代理爽感。
tags: 製造爽感/彰顯女主人格魅力

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: Tristan may be blind, but he's a genuine, honest man. You, however, have darkness in your heart, even standing in the sunlight.
examples.context: 製造爽感/彰顯女主人格魅力

examples.drama_title: 身懷異香的少女被衆人覬覦，怎知每當有男人靠近她一步上古蛇王就吃醋到失控，清除她身邊所有異性只准看他一人！短劇 #甜寵 #先婚後愛 #總裁灰姑娘
examples.excerpt: I am not a quasi-saint now / She is also the clan leader's daughter / You illegitimate daughter / concubine's daughter / The status has been determined. / Who gave you permission to act like this? / Elder, you are highly respected in the Miao region / Am I to be suspected ten times? / You have to prove it ten times.
examples.context: 製造爽感，釋放觀眾壓力
